title: PlayerKits
description: “PlayerKits allows players to save, manage, and instantly equip custom kits—available exclusively in Creative mode for easy building and testing.”
body:
PlayerKits allows server admins and players to create, manage, and share custom kits effortlessly in Minecraft 1.21.5. Perfect for multiplayer servers, mini-games, or RPG adventures, it gives players starter gear, tools, and items with just a click.

Features:

Create unlimited custom kits for players

Assign kits to specific roles or permissions

Easily share kits with friends or server members

Compatible with Fabric and Forge

Lightweight and easy to configure

Enhance your Minecraft experience by giving players ready-to-go kits for adventure, survival, or fun mini-games!
